title: isodon excisus var. racemosus
intro: Isodon excisus var. racemosus, also known as dwarf goldenroot, is a type of plant that belongs to the mint family and is native to China and other parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Isodon excisus var. racemosus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in digestion, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
